message:
fix(checkpoint): add orchestration-ID isolation, exact-replay passthrough, and epoch-regression tests

Three coupled correctness fixes to verify_chain():

1. Orchestration-ID isolation — constant-time compare record.orchestration_id
   against stream owner; reject foreign-orchestration records with
   "orchestration_id_mismatch" diagnostic
2. Exact-replay passthrough — new checkpoint_is_exact_replay helper skips
   byte-for-byte identical records (same iteration_count, epoch,
   checkpoint_id, progress_state_hash, previous_checkpoint_hash) to handle
   at-least-once delivery without false chain violations
3. Epoch-regression detection — new test save_checkpoint_rejects_epoch_regression
   verifies lower epoch produces HashChainViolation with "epoch_regressed"

Add InMemoryCheckpointBackend test helpers: duplicate_record (simulate
at-least-once delivery) and inject_record_into_stream (simulate foreign
orchestration injection). Five new tests covering replay, foreign record
rejection, and post-violation append behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
